title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Asian Paints

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Asian Paints
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
